7777.one_line_summary: Governance interfaces for human-robot societies with identity and rule management.
7777.notes: Defines IUniversalIdentity and IUniversalCharter for managing identities and rule sets for humans and robots.

7779.one_line_summary: Interoperable delegated accounts interface for redelegation between wallets post-EIP-7702.
7779.notes: Addresses storage management for delegated EOAs, enabling safe migration between wallet implementations.

7780.one_line_summary: Validation module extensions for ERC-7579 with policy, signer, and validator types.
7780.notes: Introduces policy, signer, stateless validator and pre-validation hook modules for composable account validation.

7785.one_line_summary: On-chain registration of chain identifiers using ENS and derived hashing.
7785.notes: Proposes deriving chain identifiers by hashing chain names and using ENS for decentralized mapping.

7786.one_line_summary: Cross-chain messaging gateway interface for standardized message sending and receiving.
7786.notes: Unified interface for diverse cross-chain messaging protocols using Interoperable Addresses.

7787.one_line_summary: DAO governance with soulbound, non-transferable voting power that decays over time.
7787.notes: Implements merit-based governance by decoupling governance from economic power with decay mechanics.

7794.one_line_summary: Cross-network grant registry for tracking and managing grants with lifecycle events.
7794.notes: Standardized contract for grant registration, tracking disbursements, and milestone management.

7795.one_line_summary: Wallet Call API extension for token prerequisites via wallet_sendCalls capabilities.
7795.notes: Extends EIP-5792 with token balance, allowance and ownership capability specs for wallets.

7796.one_line_summary: JSON-RPC method for block builders enabling preconditions for conditional transaction inclusion.
7796.notes: Proposes eth_sendRawTransactionConditional for conditional transaction submission reducing simulation needs.

7802.one_line_summary: Standardized crosschain token interface with crosschainMint and crosschainBurn functions.
7802.notes: Minimal extensible interface enabling bridges to mint/burn token representations across chains uniformly.

7803.one_line_summary: EIP-712 extensions with signing domains and auth method specification for smart contracts.
7803.notes: Improves EIP-712 signatures for SCAs by adding replay protection and authentication method coordination.

7806.one_line_summary: Intent-centric EOA smart account interface supporting batch execution and gas sponsorship.
7806.notes: Enables EOAs to delegate code for intent-based execution via solvers with simplified architecture versus ERC-4337.

7811.one_line_summary: JSON-RPC method wallet_getAssets for wallets to declare user asset lists to dapps.
7811.notes: Enables wallets to share asset discovery with dapps including off-chain and multi-chain assets.

7812.one_line_summary: Singleton ZK registry for storing and proving private statements using sparse Merkle trees.
7812.notes: Abstract registry system for provable statements enabling zero-knowledge proofs of private data authenticity.

7813.one_line_summary: Table-based on-chain storage with automatic indexing via standardized events and schema.
7813.notes: Flexible storage pattern with schema-aware tables enabling automatic off-chain indexing and introspection.
